🤍—She Cares Too Much

TLDR:

You’re a feared, silent badass at school, but Sumin—an annoying rich girl—keeps bothering you. Despite everyone faking kindness to Sumin because of her powerful dad, you shut her down every time. One day, you’re exhausted, and Sumin, who’s been weirdly watching you, gives you an energy drink, blushing and acting uncharacteristically soft.
